symptom: feeling bloated and out of breath after dinner with burps that would not come up
hook: the whole stomach had climbed up into the chest and flipped upside down like a balloon that floated up and rolled over
whatYouSee: A big balloon of air with a flat liquid line floating high inside the chest right behind the heart. It looks like a second stomach parked between the lungs. Down below where the stomach belongs there is nothing because the whole organ moved north.
whyItMatters: When the stomach slides up into the chest and twists on itself it can kink shut at both ends so nothing passes and the blood supply to the wall gets choked off. That makes it a true emergency because a strangled twisted stomach can die within hours.
treatment: Emergency decompression with a stomach tube if it will pass then urgent surgery to untwist the stomach pull it back below the diaphragm and close the gap so it cannot slide up again.
takeaway: Your stomach is supposed to live in your belly. Here it floated up into the chest and rolled over so the burp that would not come up was the warning.
igOptions: A. A collapsed lung full of air
B. The whole stomach flipped up into the chest
C. A giant air pocket around the heart

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in feeling bloated and breathless after dinner with burps that would not come up.

Then the X-ray loaded 😳

What's the most likely diagnosis? 🩻

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Intrathoracic stomach with gastric volvulus

👀 What you see:
A big balloon of air with a flat liquid line floating high inside the chest right behind the heart. It looks like a second stomach parked between the lungs. Down below where the stomach belongs there is nothing because the whole organ moved north.
